title: 2025-08-04 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 11.22
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-08-04: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 11.22/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-08-04, the score printed 11.22/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
